title: Cobblemon Legends: Cosmica
description: A Cobblemon modpack that adds things like Mega Evolution, more Cobblemon, more Biomes, and more!
body:
_**IMPORTANT NOTE: Please check the Resource Pack settings in game, and make sure you have AllTheMons, MissingLegends, MoreMons, and MysticMons all enabled! The rest are optional but are highly recommended!**_

**Cobblemon Legends: Cosmica is a Cobblemon modpack that expands and improves the Cobblemon experience with new and revamped content!**

_For some of the Vanilla Minecraft improvements we have:_



 - Experience new world gen with Terralith! Roughly 100 new biomes to explore, all adding unique new landscapes to explore!

- Dynamic seasons thanks to Fabric Seasons!


- Revamped Dimensions thanks to BetterNether and BetterEnd!

- Improved Minecraft structures from YUNG's Better structures series!

_Now for some Cobblemon additions!:_

- Mega Evolution is here! Mega Evolve your Cobblemon like Garedvoir, Banette, and more with Ascension Megamons!

- Map Icons for Cobblemon, done with a combination of Xaero's Minimap, and E19 Cobblemon Minimap Icons!

- Cobblemon may get agitated, if they do they might run away, or even attack you!

- TM's are here due to SimpleTM's!

Those are only some of the things this modpack adds, explore around the region of Cosmica, find what it has to offer, and shape it into your very own!
